name: agent-hud
description: Two-level resource HUD for agent status lines — a top line for THIS TUI session (CPU/MEM summed across the session's controlling tty + pwd size) and a bottom line for the whole machine (CPU/MEM + free disk on the cwd's volume). One core bash script renders the HUD; a launchd daemon samples system CPU%; thin per-agent adapters wire it into Claude Code (and stub Codex/opencode). Swappable colorways (gruvbox default, catppuccin, tokyonight, mono). macOS.
